titleStmt.title: SII 9.247: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 247. (A.R. No. 282 of 1918.) ON A SLAB SET UP NEAR THE ISVARA TEMPLE AT SRINIVASAPURAM, SAME TALUK AND DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is damaged and dated the cyclic year Prabhava in the reign of the Chāḷukya king Jagadēkamalladēva, Kārtika, amāvāse, Sūrya-grahaṇa corresponding to A.D. 1147 October 28 Sunday, when there was a solar eclipse; the month was, however, Āśvina and not Kārtika. Jagadēkamalla-Vīrapāṇḍyadēva, the king's feudatory, is said to have made a gift of land for the service of the god Āytēśvaradēva in Kūchigōḷa and for the feeding of Brāhmans and ascetics. Āditya-Sāhani, Vibhu-Pallava, his brother Bamma-Gāvuṇḍa and Kuḍugalajīya are mentioned. Kūchigōḷa is stated to be the tilaka of Uchchaṅgi.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē . trailōkyanagarāraṁbha(ṁ)mūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē .
svasti samastabhuvanāśraya śrīpṛthvī rāja paramēśvara paramabhaṭṭāraka satyā
ḷatiḷaka cāḷukyābharaṇa śrī cakravartti jagadēkamalladēvavijayarājyamuttarōttarābhivriddhipravarddha
caṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ saluttamire sukhasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁ
tatpādapadmōpajīvi . baḷavadbhūribhujaṁ nirmmaḷayādavavaṁśa maṁḍaḷikaravirāhu bhūbhujatiḷakaṁ
śrīvīrapāṁḍyadēvanripāḷaṁ dorevetta kuṁtaḷacakrēśvaraneṁdudaṁ tiṟisidaṁ taḍa ṇaprāṁta
. svasti
gatapaṁcamahāśabda subhaṭacūḍā
dvātriṁśadu
duṣṭanigraha
pratipāḷanadiṁ rājyaṁgeyyutta baladalusida
paṁkaruhavada
yirddamritā pūrvvagirisūryya
gaṁbhīra varāya maṁḍaḷamūrjita da dēśaṁ sale tānida
baraṁ tānirddaḍe nripa sannāha kaḷitakhaḷgana
ṇigaṇama sidāhavadoḷu māṇbane rāyaṁ .
ṇageḷa vikhyātarssadguṇa hēśvara rāmanātmā
yarāmana mahimeyeṁteṁdeḍe . kaḷāpanaṁte dōrvvaḷeya
ne ballidanājiraṁgadoḷa ḷu caladoḷ rāmanāma
dharitriyoḷ . Ātana patibhakte guṇōpēte ye
ma ṁgaḷa cauṁḍikabbe Avarirvvargaṁ � rakhiḷaguṇagaṇaniḷayarppravikaḷa
rddhārmmikarivarene vikhyātivettamūvarmmakkaḷu nanūnadānaguṇadoḷu piriyaṁ patibhū
piriyanaśēṣavibhavōnnatiyoḷu piriyaṁ deṟekadoḷu piriyanagurvvuvettabhujaśaktiyo
rppu varoḷu piriyatanaṁ virājisutuṁ sakala neṁtu nōrppaḍaṁ . Avaniṁ kiṟiyaṁ dharmmada tava
bhaktilateya bāḷoḍalāsakoṁḍavara siri satya tamenipādityaniṣṭakamaḷādityaṁ . guṇaratnaṁ pa
mecce tanageṁduṁ ḻda bhūṣaṇa dāvakāryyavaṟitaṁ śrīpārvvatīkaṇṭhabhūṣaṇa
pādasēveyenisalu peṁpoppuvādityasāhaṇiyaṁ nnaḷaviye visvaṁbharābhāgadoḷ . Ādityaniṁde kiṟiyaṁ
mēdiniyoḷ toḷepa caṁdraneṁbaṁtesadirppādityaniṁde kiṟiyaṁ saṁsārasāranenisida kōraṁ . patihitadoḷ parākrama
doḷguṇadoḷu piriduṁ vivēkadoḷ kṣiti pogaḷuttamirppa nūrjjitapuṇyaśaktiyoḷ caturateyoḷ sama
dharmmadoḷiṁnaradārenalke peṁpatiśayavāytudāra yasāhaṇi mārttyalōkadoḷ Iṁtī
naṁtaguṇaṁ dharmmabuddhi tanagudiyise celvaṁ taḷedu kūcigōḷadoḷo śivana bhavanamaṁ māḍisidaṁ . kūcigōḷa
daḍe . baḷasida keyvolaṁ tuṟugidārama porggeṟegaḷ niraṁtaraṁ toḷagu bhavanavaggada dhānya sava gōkuḷaṁgaḷa
renippa janaṁgaḷa hemme nāḍeyuṁ baḷedire nōḍa kūcigōḷanoppuvuda gegoṇḍu nōrppaḍa . negeduccaṁgiya tiḷakaveneṁ
bavolu nōḍa kūcigōḷaṁ raṁjipudalli peṁpuvaḍedaṁ dātāranammamma kṣmigadhīsaṁ vibhupallavaṁ jananutasāmantakaṇṭhīravaṁ jagadānaṁ
daguṇōdayaṁ musuvarādityaṁ yaduvallabha . śivacaraṇakamaḷamadhukaranavanīsaṁstutyapāṇḍyarājyābhyudayaṁ pravipuḷa
puṇyaṁ vibhupallavanenipaṁ musuvavaṁśacūḍāratna . Avanoḍavuṭṭidaṁ tribhuvanastutanaṇnanagaṁdhavāraṇaṁ śivasamaya
navaratnāmaḷōjjvaḷapūrṇnacaṁdranāhavajayadōhaḷaṁ muśuvaveṁśaśikhāmaṇiyeṁdu lōkamutsavadoḷu baṇniku negaḻda bammagavuṁ
ḍananājisauṁḍana . Avara manakkutsāhamanavayavadiṁ paḍevutirppa mūlasthānaṁ kaviḷāsaśrīnagamabhinavamenalāytēsvaraṁ virājisi
tōrkku . Ā dēvarigittaṁ caṁdrādityara raśmiyuḷḷinaṁ bhūmiyanī yādavatiḷakaṁ nijapuṇnyōdayamene negaḷe vīrapāṇḍyanripāla .
svasti śrī pratāpacakravartti jagadēkamalladēvavarṣada prabhavasaṁvatsarada kārttikadamāvāse sūryyagrahaṇa sōmavāradaṁdu
śrījagadēkamallavīrapāṇḍyadēvaru kūcigōḷadalāytēsvaradēvara pūjepunaskārakkaṁ vivēdyaAṁgabhōgajīrṇnōddhārakkaṁ
renipa brāhmaṇarigaṁ tapōdhanarigaṁ Āhāradānakkaṁ gauḍanakeṟeya keḷagaṇa gadde beddaleya sīmāsūtrameṁtaṁdaḍe
gōḍa pallavagauḍanuṁ kūcigōḷa bammagauḍanuṁ Alliya prajegaḷuṁ beseyarkkaḷuṁ tōṟida sīme Ā keṟeya teṁkaṇadi
ṭṭariya mēlaṇiṁda haṇaṁjegeṟeya jaḷa yāgi kūcigōḷana hiriyakeṟeya haḍuva
reyāgi baḍagaṇa mūḍaṇa kōṇi Aṁtu yāgi Ā keṟeya kūḍuva nīrottu mēreya
mēreyāgi Alliṁ mūḍa beḷuhadiya mara Alliṁ mūḍaṇa mēreyāgi ndoḷage
du © svasti yamaniyamasvādhyāyadhyānadhāraṇamōnānuṣṭhāṇajapassamādhiśīḷaguṇa
samotpannaru śivacaraṇakamaḷārādhanakriyākuśaḷarappa kuḍugalajīya
dhārāpūrvvakaṁ māḍi koṭṭaru gurugaḷu samastaprajegaḷu
pratipāḷisuvaru
damaged
Anitu kavileyuṁ brāhmaṇa
tōṭa kūṭa
Digital edition of SII 9.247 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
